final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial illustration of a cyberpunk futuristic city nightscape with towering skyscrapers, neon lights, and flying cars.

Style/medium: digital matte painting, cyberpunk editorial illustration in the spirit of Blade Runner 2049 and Syd Mead concept art, photorealistic rendering
Composition: wide establishing shot, slight low-angle looking up into the skyline, deep perspective with layered depth — foreground puddles, mid-ground street level, background towering skyscrapers receding into haze
Subject: dense futuristic megacity skyline packed with skyscrapers covered in holographic billboards and flickering neon signage; multiple flying cars streaking through narrow air corridors between buildings, motion-blur light trails visible
Scene/backdrop: nighttime city exterior, acid rain falling in visible diagonal streaks, ground-level street flooded with shallow puddles reflecting neon and building lights, smoggy low-hanging clouds diffusing glow from below
Lighting/mood: dominant blue-violet neon ambient light, secondary magenta and cyan accent glows from signage, harsh rim lighting on building edges, moody and decadent atmosphere with a sense of technological oppression
Color palette: deep indigo and violet as base tones, electric cyan and magenta neon as accents, warm amber sparingly on distant windows, overall desaturated except for neon sources
Materials/textures: wet concrete and asphalt with mirror-like puddle reflections, glass and steel skyscraper facades with grime and wear, rain streaks on surfaces, atmospheric haze and volumetric light shafts
Avoid: daytime lighting, warm sunny palette, clean utopian aesthetic, lens flare stuffer, 8K watermark, cheerful mood
